rationale: The primary workflow installs and runs a Node-based cookie sync script from the skill directory, so it reads the skill package/script files and may create or prune node_modules and package-lock data. Cookie extraction is via Chrome DevTools Protocol on the local remote-debugging endpoint rather than direct browser-profile file reads. The script must call Browserbase to create or update persistent contexts, and the documented browsing workflow may connect to authenticated target sites such as Google, GitHub, X/Twitter through the browse CLI.
